questions.hindi: मैं कल यह काम करने जा रहा हूँ।
options: We are going to start a new business.
I am not going to repeat this mistake.
She is going to become a doctor.
I am going to do this work tomorrow.
questions.answer: I am going to do this work tomorrow.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मैं कल यह काम करने जा रहा हूँ।" = "I am going to do this work tomorrow."

questions.sentence: She is going _____ become a doctor.
options: going
to
questions.answer: to
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "She is going to become a doctor."
